learnings.summary: claude: CLI "claude" rejected flags ["--effort","low","--model","haiku","-p","--no-input"]: error: unknown option '--no-input'.
claude: CLI "claude" rejected flags ["--model","haiku","-p","--no-input"]: error: unknown option '--no-input'. Update HEADLESS_F

When testing two branches side by side with worktrees, dispatch two parallel agents (one per branch) instead of running everything sequentially in one thread. Each agent can set up its worktree, install deps, start its dev server, and run tests independently.
